The WordPress community is thriving on YouTube in 2025 with an extensive roster of podcasts, agencies, solo creators, plugin teams, managed hosting providers and others that actively shape the WordPress ecosystem as we know it.

In this article, the GBTI Network shares its latest research with a curated list of 50+ WordPress YouTube creator channels you can subscribe to today.

## Official Channels

### Official WordPress YouTube & Spotify Channels

_The **WordPress YouTube channel (@WordPress)** is the official hub for the global WordPress project and community. It exists to support users and contributors by providing educational and community-focused resources. Content includes tutorials on features and plugins, updates on new releases, developer tips, and stories from across the WordPress ecosystem. This official YouTube channel has over **113,000 subscribers** and more than **5,600 videos**. Videos are presented by a mix of WordPress team members and community contributors rather than a single host._

[SUBSCRIBE to The Official WordPress Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@WordPress)

[SUBSCRIBE ON SPOTIFY](https://open.spotify.com/show/09mH9E9fwWNl0wCGb1kJPt)

### WordCampUS

WordCamp US (@WordCampUS) is the official YouTube channel for the flagship WordPress conference held annually in the United States. It features recordings of keynote talks, workshops, and community sessions that cover everything from development and accessibility to marketing and emerging trends. With a growing library of videos, the channel serves as an archive of insights and ideas shared by speakers and contributors from across the WordPress community. Viewers can use it to reSUBSCRIBE past sessions or catch up on the latest developments in the WordPress space.  
  
**Editor's Note: The WordCampUS page is sorely out of date without updated content since  Aug 2023. It seems all recent content is being published to the official WordPress YouTube account.** 

[SUBSCRIBE WordCampUS](https://www.youtube.com/@WordCampUS)

### WordCampEU

WordCamp Europe (@wordcampeurope) is the official YouTube channel for Europe’s flagship WordPress conference, featuring presentations, workshops, and event recaps from WP enthusiasts across the continent. It offers full session recordings and highlights—covering development best practices, community talks, and more—from conferences like WCEU 2025. With around 393 subscribers and approximately 15 videos, it serves as a compact archive for anyone wanting to relive or explore event talks. Content is presented by event speakers, organizers, and community members during and after the live conference sessions.  
  
**Editor's Note: The WordCampEU channels is better maintained currently than the WordCampUS channel.** 

[SUBSCRIBE WordCampEU](https://www.youtube.com/@wordcampeurope)

### WordCampAsia

WordCamp Asia (@wordcampasia) is the official YouTube channel for the WordPress conference held in Asia, featuring recordings of keynote talks, workshop sessions, and community presentations. Its content showcases topics like development best practices, accessibility, marketing, and emerging WordPress trends from events such as WordCamp Asia 2025. With around 579 subscribers and approximately 169 videos, the channel serves as a growing video archive for event insights and inspiration. Sessions are presented by conference speakers, organizers, and attendees who bring the WordPress community together on stage.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/c2aFdpAazvo/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE WordCampAsia](https://www.youtube.com/@wordcampasia)

## Podcasts, Tutorials & More

### WP Builds

WP Builds (@WPBuilds) is the official YouTube hub for the WordPress podcast network led by Nathan Wrigley, focusing on weekly news roundups, podcast episodes, webinars, product demos, and more. The content dives into topics central to the WordPress ecosystem—including accessibility, plugin startups, speed optimization, and community updates—with a format that blends in-depth discussion and tutorial-style segments. The channel has around 1.8K subscribers and over 1.1K videos, reflecting a deep archive of WordPress-related talks and shows. Videos typically feature Nathan alongside guests and co-hosts from the community, delivering engaging conversation and expert insights into the state of WordPress.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/4YWZLSed1aw/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @WPBuilds](https://www.youtube.com/@WPBuilds)

[SUBSCRIBE ON SPOTIFY](https://open.spotify.com/show/4vjPvbD7MNr4DX4UdJWDwt)

### WordPress Tavern

WP Tavern (@WPTavern) is the official YouTube channel of the WP Tavern platform, best known for WordPress news, commentary, and in-depth discussion within the community. The channel features podcast-style episodes, industry interviews, news roundups, and conversations on key trends shaping WordPress. It has approximately 154 subscribers and hosts around 209 videos, creating a focused archive of WordPress-centered content. Videos are most often presented by WP Tavern contributors, such as Nathan Wrigley and Jeff Chandler, bringing journalistic and community insights to each episode.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/Eb43C2Z0ATk/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @wptavern](https://www.youtube.com/@wptavern)

### BuildWithHeart

_@CodeableHQ is the official channel of [Codeable.io](https://gbti.network/outbound/codeable), a vetted freelancer platform that connects top-tier WordPress developers with clients seeking high-quality work. It features a mix of podcast-style interviews, platform stories, and the “Build with Heart” series, offering insight into the agency-client collaboration and freelance mindset. While subscriber and video metrics aren’t publicly visible, the channel reflects Codeable’s brand focus and community engagement. The content is presented by Codeable team members and guest experts, packaged with a polished, professional vibe._

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/zvSIZ9PTyiM/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @CodeableHQ](https://www.youtube.com/@CodeableHQ)

### WPMayor

WP Mayor (@WPMayor) is dedicated to WordPress reviews, tutorials, and expert guidance across themes, plugins, and AI-enabled workflows. The content showcases practical how-tos and hands-on walkthroughs aimed at helping users build better, faster WordPress sites. The channel has approximately 1.3K subscribers and around 73 videos, offering a focused but valuable video archive. Videos are typically hosted and presented by the WP Mayor team, led by brand representatives and experts from RebelCode Ltd.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/nLECaAWgb4s/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @WPMayor](https://www.youtube.com/@WPMayor)

[SUBSCRIBE ON SPOTIFY](https://open.spotify.com/show/5TiD6wTVxdcnaSRpBoU1fu)

### WP Minute Podcasts

WP Minute Podcasts (@wpminutepodcasts) is the YouTube home for The WP Minute and The WP Minute+ podcast series, delivering weekly WordPress news, trends, and long-form interviews in concise video format. Episodes include five-minute briefs on WordPress developments (The WP Minute) and deeper discussions on industry insights (The WP Minute+). The channel has around 251 subscribers and hosts approximately 492 videos, offering a consistently updated archive for WordPress professionals. Videos are presented by podcast hosts such as Matt Medeiros and Eric Karkovack, who guide each episode with clarity and insight.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/iVgPcV5tdtw/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @wpminutepodcasts](https://www.youtube.com/@wpminutepodcasts)

[SUBSCRIBE ON SPOTIFY](https://open.spotify.com/show/3eqg8HCTv98ip3VeuaJZkk)

### PostStatus

Post Status (@PostStatus) is a media and community-focused YouTube channel that delivers podcasts, webinars, and livestreamed discussions tailored for WordPress professionals. Its content includes the “Post Status Draft”, "Women in WordPress", "Cache Up" and “Happiness Hour” series, where hosts interview industry voices, cover recent WP news, and offer deep analysis of trends affecting developers, agencies, and product makers. The channel has about 602 subscribers and over 220 videos, providing a steady archive of conversations relevant to serious WordPress users. Videos are typically hosted by team members here at Post Status, often featuring guest experts and community leaders.

[SUBSCRIBE @PostStatus](https://www.youtube.com/@PostStatus)

[SUBSCRIBE ON SPOTIFY](https://open.spotify.com/show/1m3xwXbe0MG5BzFVPtB0A7)

### MediaForge Productions

MediaForge Productions (@MediaForgeProductions) is the YouTube channel of the experienced WordPress development studio known for its educational content and custom solutions. It features clear, high-quality instructional videos—often related to WordPress workflows, plugin development, and site-building best practices—delivered in a personable and accessible style. Currently, the channel has around 10 subscribers and six videos, making it a modest but focused multimedia resource. Videos are typically hosted by Topher DeRosia and the MediaForge team, who bring decades of WordPress experience and developer insight to each tutorial.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/I4u1zkX5_jg/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE MediaForge Productions](https://www.youtube.com/@MediaForgeProductions/videos)

### Within WordPress

Within WordPress (@WithinWordPress) is a channel led by WordPress veteran Remkus de Vries, who specializes in improving WordPress performance, scalability, and security. It features in-depth discussions like “Diving Deep with Matt Cromwell: WordPress Plugins, Product Ownership, and the Future of AI,” offering insights into plugin development, product strategy, and emerging technologies. Though specific metrics like subscriber count and total videos aren’t public, its content appears focused and informative—appealing to developers and power users. Videos are hosted by Remkus and guest experts, emphasizing technical depth and industry expertise.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/c3TjgK7CHIA/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @WithinWordPress](https://www.youtube.com/@WithinWordPress)

### Beyond The CMS

Beyond The CMS (@BeyondTheCMS) is a podcast hosted by Chris Bryce, founder of Dotfusion Digital. The show explores the future of content management systems through conversations with thought leaders, innovators, and executives from platforms like Contentful, Storyblok, Agility, and Magnolia. With 8 subscribers currently, 74 videos, and just over 7,000 views, the channel serves as a niche archive of discussions on headless architecture, composable solutions, personalization, and AI-driven strategies. Videos are presented in a podcast format, blending interviews and panel-style deep dives on the evolving CMS landscape.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/8VohyQhJAfg/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @BeyondTheCMS](https://www.youtube.com/@BeyondTheCMS)

[SUBSCRIBE ON SPOTIFY](https://www.youtube.com/@BeyondTheCMS)

### WPTuts

The **WordPress YouTube channel (@WordPress)** is the official hub for the global WordPress project and community. It exists to support users and contributors by providing educational and community-focused resources. Content includes tutorials on features and plugins, updates on new releases, developer tips, and stories from across the WordPress ecosystem. The channel has over **113,000 subscribers** and more than **5,600 videos**. Videos are presented by a mix of WordPress team members and community contributors rather than a single host.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/CFCdhVgQmNw/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @WPTuts](https://www.youtube.com/@WPTuts)

### WPBeginner

WPBeginner (@WPBeginner) is the go-to YouTube channel for WordPress newcomers, created by the team behind the WPBeginner resource site. It delivers easy-to-follow tutorials on everything from website setup and plugin usage to SEO and small-business tips. The channel boasts around 1.01 million subscribers and approximately 1,300 videos, offering one of the most expansive libraries for WordPress education. Videos are hosted by the WPBeginner team, often featuring step-by-step walkthroughs that are accessible and beginner-friendly.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/dhUF187MDsI/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @wpbeginner](https://www.youtube.com/@wpbeginner)

### WPCrafter

WPCrafter (@WPCrafter.com WordPress For Non-Techies) is a solo creator channel led by Adam Preiser, offering straightforward, beginner-focused WordPress tutorials that speak directly to non-technical audiences. The content ranges from theme setup and plugin walkthroughs to long-form project builds, all designed to simplify WordPress fundamentals for users who prefer clarity over complexity. With around 250K subscribers and over 500 videos, it stands as one of the most expansive and enduring WordPress learning resources on YouTube. Adam hosts all videos himself, delivering instruction with a friendly, easy-to-follow style that empowers everyday users to build with confidence.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/fFKJfbWLif4/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @WPCrafter](https://www.youtube.com/@WPCrafter)

### Agency Mavericks

Agency Mavericks (@AgencyMavericks) is the YouTube channel for Agency Mavericks, a coaching and training platform for web design and digital agency owners focused on growth, profitability, and team development. The content features weekly coaching sessions, interviews with industry leaders, and strategic lessons designed to help agencies scale more effectively. With approximately 11.2K subscribers and over 1,000 videos, it serves as an extensive resource for agency-focused insights and guidance. Videos are typically led by the Agency Mavericks coaching team, delivering practical frameworks, peer lessons, and expert conversations.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/2T2X7XnBn04/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @AgencyMavericks](https://www.youtube.com/@AgencyMavericks)

### Pronto Marketing

Pronto Marketing (@Prontomarketing) is the official YouTube presence of Pronto Marketing, a full-service WordPress and SEO agency specializing in building, maintaining, and promoting websites for small and medium businesses. The channel features client success stories, process walkthroughs, and marketing strategy insights tailored to agencies and service providers. It has around 195 subscribers and 129 videos, offering a practical gallery of real-world examples and agency reflections. Video presenters include agency team members who walk through workflows, platform capabilities, and agency-building lessons.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/EqamFw1pMTg/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @Prontomarketing](https://www.youtube.com/@Prontomarketing)

## Individual Creators

### Jonathan Bossenger

Jonathan Bossenger (@jon\_bossenger) is a solo creator whose channel—branded as Jon learns to code with AI—combines WordPress development with artificial intelligence in a hands-on, exploratory style. His videos document experiments like building WordPress plugins, performing AI code reviews, and addressing security issues, all while showcasing how AI can assist in coding workflows. The channel has approximately 338 subscribers and around 123 videos, offering a niche but growing library at the intersection of AI and WordPress. Episodes feature Jonathan as the sole host, guiding viewers through learn-as-you-build sessions with clarity and curiosity.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/qASy45jM2lE/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @jon\_bossenger](https://www.youtube.com/@jon_bossenger)

### Jamie WP

Jamie WP (@jamiewp) is a solo creator channel led by Jamie Marsland, a seasoned WordPress educator and plugin developer. His content spans practical tutorials, developer insights, and engaging community-driven series like the popular “WordPress Speed Build Challenge.” The channel boasts around 189,000 subscribers and approximately 480 videos, showcasing his prolific and sustained output. Videos are presented by Jamie himself, whose background in digital strategy and training shines through in his clear, hands-on teaching style.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/Z12kUMtLODw/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE Jamie WP](https://www.youtube.com/@jamiewp)

### Chris Lema

Chris Lema (@ChrisLema) is the personal YouTube channel of Chris Lema, a well-known WordPress strategist, speaker, and business coach. His videos focus on practical advice for entrepreneurs and digital product teams, with topics ranging from membership sites and SaaS strategy to leadership and storytelling. The channel has over 3.5K subscribers and features around 313 videos, offering a strong library of strategic and motivational content. Every video is hosted by Chris himself, sharing lessons drawn from decades of experience in the WordPress and tech industry.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/JM5KfnwFPRA/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @chrislema](https://www.youtube.com/chrislema)

### Darrel Wilson

Darrel Wilson (@darrelwilson) is a solo creator channel where Darrel delivers engaging and straightforward WordPress tutorials, guiding viewers from beginner basics to advanced techniques. His videos cover popular tools like Elementor, e-commerce site building, and beginner-friendly site setup—all presented with clarity and a fun, approachable tone. With around 467K subscribers and approximately 577 videos, the channel offers a rich education library for site builders of all levels. Darrel hosts each video himself, combining technical guidance with an energetic and accessible delivery style.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/xXa8d3O-NK0/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @darrelwilson](https://www.youtube.com/@darrelwilson)

### Osom to Know

Osom to Know (@osomtoknow) is a podcast-style YouTube channel hosted by Maciej Nowak that dives into thoughtful conversations with WordPress experts—exploring themes like theme evolution, AI in WordPress, UX, and more. The channel serves as an educational hub, offering deep-dive episodes on how WordPress has transformed over time and what lies ahead. With approximately 625 subscribers and around 196 videos, it offers a comprehensive archive for developers, agency owners, and WordPress enthusiasts. Episodes are typically presented by Maciej alone or alongside guest innovators from the WordPress ecosystem.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/hYw8ooSYKyY/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @osomtoknow](https://www.youtube.com/@osomtoknow)

### Hendrik “Surfstyk” Bondzio

Surfstyk (@surfstyk) is a solo creator channel led by Hendrik "surfstyk" Bondzio, a fractional tech strategist passionate about building smarter WordPress tools. Through videos, he guides viewers in creating efficient solutions—like lightweight membership plugins and CRM workflows—emphasizing simplicity, user-friendly design, and real-world functionality. The channel has 16 subscribers and 47 videos, offering a modest but highly focused repository of developer-oriented insights. Hendrik presents each video himself, combining strategic thinking with hands-on tinkering and thoughtful reflection.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/_dDmuZ8aLeo/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @surfstyk](https://www.youtube.com/@surfstyk)

### Ferdy Korpershoek

Ferdy.com | Ferdy Korpershoek (@ferdycom) is a solo creator channel where Ferdy teaches viewers how to build complete websites with WordPress. His videos focus on practical, beginner-friendly tutorials covering eCommerce, Elementor, listing sites, and design workflows—providing clear guidance for those wanting to launch their own projects. With over 1.24 million subscribers, about 545 videos, and more than 41 million views, the channel stands out as one of the most influential educational resources in the WordPress space. Ferdy hosts all videos himself, presenting step-by-step instructions in a friendly and approachable style.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/jBag6Tqguo0/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @ferdycom](https://www.youtube.com/@ferdycom)

### Rino de Boer

Rino de Boer (@rinodeboer) is a solo creator channel led by designer and educator Rino de Boer, dedicated to helping designers build sustainable, no-code WordPress businesses. The videos offer practical tutorials on tools like Elementor, UX strategies, and transitions from Figma to live sites—ideal for designers breaking into WordPress. With over 238,000 subscribers and roughly 153 videos, the channel delivers a rich library of actionable design-focused content. Rino presents every video himself, combining down-to-earth guidance with strategic insights grounded in real-world design and business experience.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/TKwqTarIqok/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @rinodeboer](https://www.youtube.com/@rinodeboer)

### Tyler Moore

Tyler Moore (@TylerMoore) is a solo creator known for no-nonsense, step-by-step WordPress tutorials that guide viewers through everything from basic setup to full website builds—with every detail included. His channel has a substantial following of around 474K subscribers and features approximately 238 long-format videos, offering an extensive and reliable resource for hands-on learners. Tyler hosts every video himself, maintaining a focused, conversational teaching style that resonates with both beginners and more experienced users.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/gzVkLOtforo/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @TylerMoore](https://www.youtube.com/@TylerMoore)

### Jonathan Jernigan (@_Permaslug_)

Permaslug (@Permaslug) is the WordPress-focused YouTube channel by Jonathan Jernigan, offering a diverse range of content from tutorials to live streams covering themes like Oxygen Builder, dynamic content, and developer workflows. With approximately 11.6K subscribers and 228 videos, the channel presents a substantial and consistent body of practical WordPress education. Jonathan hosts all videos, combining hands-on demonstrations with insightful explanations that cater to developers and site builders seeking actionable skills. His content delivers both project-based walkthroughs and deeper discussions about tool usage and workflow optimization.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/eufIt69_hAg/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @Permaslug](https://www.youtube.com/@Permaslug)

### Edward Sturm (@buildinpublic)

Build in Public (@buildinpublic) is a solo creator channel by Edward Sturm, a marketer, entrepreneur, and early viral video creator. The channel focuses on SEO, digital marketing, organic social growth, founder stories, and growth hacks—often drawing directly from Edward’s own experiences scaling companies. With more than 38,000 subscribers and over 2,600 videos, it blends daily SEO tips with long-form interviews and thought leadership content. Edward hosts all videos himself, leveraging his background in consulting, startups, and viral media to provide both practical tactics and strategic insights.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/8VohyQhJAfg/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE Edward Sturm (@buildinpublic)](https://www.youtube.com/@buildinpublic)

### Remkus de Vries

_Remkus de Vries (@remkusdevries) is the YouTube channel of WordPress performance specialist Remkus de Vries, who shares insights on building, optimizing, and scaling fast, reliable WordPress sites. The videos focus on performance best practices, performance optimization tools, and site architecture—offering deep technical content tailored for developers and agency professionals. The channel currently has 581 subscribers and features approximately 32 videos, making it a concise, expert-driven knowledge base. Hosted by Remkus himself, episodes often include detailed demonstrations alongside expert guidance and real-world examples._ _Remkus keeps a moreup to date channel already listed within this article, Within WordPress._

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/l6_uBWWYono/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @remkusdevries](https://www.youtube.com/@remkusdevries)

### Ryan Welcher Codes

RyanWelcherCodes (@RyanWelcherCodes) is the YouTube channel of Ryan Welcher, a seasoned WordPress developer advocate sponsored by Automattic and a core contributor to the Gutenberg/WordPress project. His content centers on building with blocks, the block editor, custom block development, full-site editing, and other developer-centric workflows in WordPress. The channel has about 500-600 subscribers, roughly 38 videos, and a modest view count, making it a niche but valuable resource. Videos are hosted by Ryan himself, often livestreamed or recorded as deep technical discussions that include real-world code examples and interactions with the WordPress community.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/TIMbcHF-g3M/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @RyanWelcherCodes](https://www.youtube.com/@RyanWelcherCodes)

### Elliott Richmond

Elliott Richmond (@elliottrichmondwp) is a solo creator channel by Elliott Richmond, a WordPress developer with over 20 years of experience in themes, plugins, and WooCommerce. His content focuses on block theme development, full site editing, AI-powered WordPress tools, custom post types, and practical tutorials that bridge classic and modern WordPress workflows. While exact subscriber numbers aren’t listed, his videos are attracting good attention, especially for tutorials that demystify newer WordPress features and editor tools. Videos are hosted by Elliott himself, with clear teaching style and a focus on helping developers and site builders adapt to evolving WordPress standards.

[SUBSCRIBE @elliottrichmondwp](https://www.youtube.com/@elliottrichmondwp)

### JuanMa Garrido

JuanMa Garrido (@juanmacodes) is a solo creator channel led by JuanMa, a Full-Stack developer and automatic contributor deeply involved in WordPress and open-source work. The channel features WordPress development videos (mostly in Spanish), gear toward showing how to work with themes, plugins, block editor, and sometimes SQLite, along with insights pulled from his work with Gutenberg and other open-source projects. He has about 207 subscribers and 49 videos, giving a focused but meaningful collection of technical content. Videos are hosted by JuanMa himself, offering both walkthroughs and discussions that dig into real coding and practical development problems.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/g5EW3vhqNpY/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @juanmacodes](https://www.youtube.com/@juanmacodes)

## Product Shops (plugins, themes & more)

### Crocoblock

_Crocoblock (@Crocoblock) is the official YouTube channel for Crocoblock, the developer behind the JetPlugins suite for Elementor, Bricks, and WordPress. Their videos deliver plugin tutorials, feature breakdowns, use-case guides, and troubleshooting tips that help users build dynamic, no-code WordPress sites. The channel boasts around 34.6K subscribers and 490+ videos, making it a robust learning hub for site builders. Crocoblock team members and guest presenters walk through demonstrations and real-world plugin applications with clarity._

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/CdIh_J9N8lc/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @Crocoblock](https://www.youtube.com/@Crocoblock)

### BrainStormForce

_Brainstorm Force (@BrainstormForce) is the official YouTube channel of the team behind popular WordPress tools like Astra, Ultimate Addons, ZipWP, SureCart, and CartFlows. Their videos offer walkthroughs, free courses, and creative tutorials—covering everything from theme setup and page builder workflows to AI-powered site design and optimization. With around 71,100 subscribers and over 330 videos, it serves as a rich library of actionable video content for both beginners and seasoned WordPress users. Brainstorm Force team members and guest presenters guide users through real-world use cases and step-by-step demonstrations._

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/j5WbbPLTzmc/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @BrainstormForce](https://www.youtube.com/@BrainstormForce)

### Elegant Themes

Elegant Themes (@ElegantThemes) is the official YouTube channel for the creators of the Divi theme and suite of WordPress design tools. Their content features in-depth tutorials, design walkthroughs, and plugin feature demonstrations—helping both beginners and seasoned site builders get the most out of Divi and related products. The channel boasts around 218K subscribers and over 2.7K videos, making it a highly comprehensive resource for WordPress visual design and workflow tutorials. Videos are presented by Elegant Themes team members and guest experts, offering polished, real-world examples and creative strategies for building standout sites.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/XutcUA0RCcs/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @elegantthemes](https://www.youtube.com/@elegantthemes)

### Kadence WP

Kadence WP (@KadenceWP) is the official YouTube channel for Kadence, the team behind powerful WordPress tools like the Kadence Theme, Kadence Blocks, and Shop Kit. The channel offers tutorial walkthroughs, feature deep dives, and practical guides that help users build fast, customization-friendly WordPress sites. It has about 14.5K subscribers and around 163 videos, creating a substantial resource for site builders and designers. Content is presented by Kadence team members demonstrating real-world use cases and plugin functionalities.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/ER6yvAIFYOw/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @KadenceWP](https://www.youtube.com/@KadenceWP)

### MyMainWP

MainWP (@MyMainWP) is the official YouTube channel for the MainWP Dashboard plugin, offering hands-on tutorials and walkthroughs on managing multiple WordPress sites from a single interface. Its WordPress-focused content covers setup guides, plugin usage, and streamlined site-management techniques tailored for agencies, developers, and multisite administrators. The channel has around 1.8K subscribers and a library of approximately 350 videos. Videos are hosted by the plugin creators and support team, who deliver clear step-by-step demonstrations.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/01KaWaQ14BA/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @MyMainWP](https://www.youtube.com/@MyMainWP)

### ****wpDataTables****

wpDataTables (@wpDataTables) is the official channel for the popular WordPress plugin that helps users create and manage tables, charts, and data visualizations. The channel delivers plugin walkthroughs, feature updates, and tutorials that help creators work with complex data using wpDataTables tools. It has approximately 4.9K subscribers and hosts around 176 videos, forming a solid educational library for users. Videos are typically presented by members of the wpDataTables team or product experts, offering clear, demo-driven content to guide users through practical use cases.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/UdHIa-Ai4Vc/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @wpDataTables](https://www.youtube.com/@wpDataTables)

### ******Formidable Forms******

Formidable Forms (@FormidableForms) is the official YouTube channel for the Formidable Forms WordPress plugin, widely used for building advanced forms, directories, surveys, and data-driven solutions. The videos deliver tutorials, feature walk-throughs, and use-case demonstrations to help users harness the full power of the plugin. The channel has around 6K subscribers and approximately 235 videos, making it a well-stocked learning resource. Presenters include members of the Formidable team and product experts, who offer clear, demo-focused guidance to make complex tasks approachable.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/WBIrj2YIXPY/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @FormidableForms](https://www.youtube.com/@FormidableForms)

### ******SEOPress******

SEOPress (@SEOPress) is the official YouTube channel for SEOPress, a WordPress plugin focused on SEO (search engine optimization) tools and capabilities. Their content includes plugin walkthroughs, SEO tips, feature updates, and tutorials aimed at helping WordPress users optimize their sites for better search visibility. Subscriber and video-count metrics aren’t clearly visible from the public page, suggesting low visibility or limited content presence. Videos are likely presented by members of the SEOPress team or experts affiliated with the plugin, delivering guidance in a technical but practical style.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/oZ3seJlL1W8/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @SEOPress](https://www.youtube.com/@SEOPress)

### ******Greyd******

GREYD.SUITE (@greydsuite) is the official YouTube channel for GREYD.SUITE, a toolset that empowers users to build professional WordPress websites without relying on additional plugins. The channel offers video walkthroughs on features like block editing, multisite setup, media import/export, header/footer design, and advanced search—showcasing how GREYD.SUITE replaces multiple tools with a unified solution. While subscriber and video metrics aren’t publicly available, the content reflects a focused and practical learning resource for WordPress builders. Presenters are typically the GREYD.SUITE team, delivering clear, feature-based demonstrations to help users get the most out of the toolset.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/YicT-sRp2Gc/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @greydsuite](https://www.youtube.com/@greydsuite)

### ******Elementor******

Elementor (@Elementor) is the official YouTube channel from the team behind the popular WordPress page builder Elementor. It offers comprehensive tutorials, design walkthroughs, and feature deep dives—helping users master responsive layouts, motion effects, and advanced design techniques. The channel boasts approximately 361K subscribers and around 796 videos, making it one of the most robust video resources for WordPress visual design. Videos are presented by Elementor team members and guest creators, crafted to simplify complex site-building tasks with clarity and creativity.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/L18-bGFcItQ/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @Elementor](https://www.youtube.com/@Elementor)

### ******BuddyBoss******

BuddyBoss (@BuddybossWP) is the official YouTube channel for BuddyBoss, the platform behind advanced community and membership tools for WordPress. The channel features tutorials, feature walkthroughs, platform updates, and user guidance that help creators build social hubs and membership-driven experiences. It has around 17.4K subscribers and approximately 455 videos, creating a sizable resource for learning and implementation. Videos are presented by BuddyBoss team members and guest presenters who demonstrate practical, real-world applications.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/lcT17zE4WD4/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @BuddybossWP](https://www.youtube.com/@BuddybossWP)

### ********EWWW Image Optimizer********

EWWW Image Optimizer (@EWWWImageOptimizer) is the official YouTube channel for the WordPress plugin that specializes in image compression and site-speed enhancements. It features tutorials on optimal plugin setup, performance tuning, and how to leverage tools like WebP and lazy loading for faster load times. The channel has around 582 subscribers and approximately 50 videos, providing a concise but focused learning resource. Content is typically presented by the EWWW team, delivering clear, demo-driven guidance.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/8C09JHxlaa8/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @EWWWImageOptimizer](https://www.youtube.com/@EWWWImageOptimizer)

### ********MotoPress********

MotoPress (@MotoPressPlugins) is the official YouTube channel for MotoPress, the creators behind WordPress plugins and themes—particularly known for solutions like Hotel Booking and Appointment Booking. The channel offers tutorials, feature walkthroughs, and demonstrations that help users implement and configure MotoPress tools effectively. It has around 5K subscribers and roughly 250 videos, forming a rich educational archive. Videos are presented by the MotoPress team, offering clear, demo-oriented guidance for users building booking and site-management functionality.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/cJpUmrnyhks/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @MotoPressPlugins](https://www.youtube.com/@MotoPressPlugins)

### **********PublishPress**********

PublishPress (@PublishPress) is the official YouTube channel for the PublishPress suite of WordPress publishing tools. It offers concise walkthroughs and feature demos—like editorial workflows, permission management, content scheduling, and custom statuses—that help users harness its plugins for structured publishing. The channel serves a niche audience of site managers and publishers, with around 894 subscribers and 209 videos, forming a committed resource library. Videos are presented by the PublishPress team, delivering clear, tool-focused tutorials designed for real-world editorial needs.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/l2x1J1pMTk8/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @PublishPress](https://www.youtube.com/@PublishPress)

### **********Build With Barn2**********

Build With Barn2 (@buildwithbarn2) is the official YouTube channel of Barn2, the company behind popular WooCommerce plugins like Product Table and Document Library Pro. The channel offers practical tutorials, feature walkthroughs, and live Q&A sessions that help developers implement and troubleshoot Barn2 tools effectively. It currently has around 8.8K subscribers and roughly 330 videos, forming a well-rounded educational resource. Videos are typically hosted by Barn2 team members such as Katie and Sam, delivering clear, real-world guidance on plugin usage.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/qTg131kIRQQ/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @buildwithbarn2](https://www.youtube.com/@buildwithbarn2)

### ************Patchstack************

Patchstack – Security for WordPress & WooCommerce (@patchstack) is the official YouTube channel for Patchstack, a leading vulnerability management tool designed for WordPress developers, agencies, and site owners. The channel delivers practical tutorials, security lessons, and real-world insights on safeguarding WordPress and WooCommerce sites. It currently has 258 subscribers and around 34 videos, serving as a concise hub for security-minded users. Videos are presented by the Patchstack team, offering clear, actionable content focused on plugin, theme, and WordPress core vulnerabilities.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/NXFI7YtMp9k/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @patchstack](https://www.youtube.com/@patchstack)

### **************LifterLMS**************

LifterLMS (@LifterLMS) is the official YouTube channel for the LifterLMS WordPress plugin, a leading solution for creating online courses, memberships, and learning websites. The channel features tutorials, feature deep dives, and demos that help site creators build and manage educational platforms using the plugin. It has approximately 5.4K subscribers and around 1.8K videos, forming a comprehensive video library for course creators and educators. Videos are presented by the LifterLMS team—offering friendly, step-by-step guidance tailored to real-world needs in online learning.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/lY0TatMULjs/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @LifterLMS](https://www.youtube.com/@melapresshq)

### **************Melapress**************

Melapress (@melapresshq) is the official YouTube channel for Melapress, a developer known for high-quality WordPress security and administrative utility plugins, including login protection and activity monitoring. The channel provides tutorials, demos, and livestream sessions that help website administrators improve security, manage resources, and implement advanced user controls—like setting up WP 2FA and handling login security workflows. It currently has around 150 subscribers and over 150 videos, serving as a focused, expert-led archive for practical security strategies. Videos are hosted by the Melapress team, delivering hands-on guidance and real-world plugin use cases.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/BRnQ7COjHuI/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @melapresshq](https://www.youtube.com/@melapresshq)

### **************GBTI Network**************

_This is our YoutTube channel where we showcase our products. We're still discovering our identity on YouTube, but we hope to be more active in the future!_  
  
The GBTI Network is a professional product development community, content factory, and syndication network powered by a profite sharing model. More more information, or to join as a member, please visit the [GBTI Network](https://gbti.network) homepage!

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/mKA_j0gexQU/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @gbti\_network](https://www.youtube.com/@gbti_network)

## Managed WordPress Hosts

### **************WordPress.com**************

WordPress.com is the official YouTube channel for WordPress.com, part of the Automattic family, offering a broad range of content aimed at users building and managing sites on their platform. The channel includes tutorials, feature demos, hosting tips, and community stories that help beginners and site-owners get the most out of WordPress.com. Its subscriber count and total number of videos are not clearly listed from public data. Videos are hosted by WordPress.com team members and contributors, often designed to be accessible and useful for a wide audience with varying levels of experience.

[SUBSCRIBE @wordpressdotcom](https://www.youtube.com/wordpressdotcom)

### **************Pressidium**************

Pressidium (@Pressidium) is the official YouTube channel for Pressidium, a premium managed WordPress hosting provider known for high-performance and secure hosting solutions. The channel regularly features "PRESS Talks"—interviews and conversations with engineers and industry experts—alongside videos that showcase features of their edge-powered hosting platform. It currently has 56 subscribers and around 38 videos, offering a compact collection of expert insights and technical deep dives. Content is presented by Pressidium team members and guests, delivered in a polished, informative style that reflects the brand’s technical credibility.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/KPKcHmIWcsU/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @Pressidium](https://www.youtube.com/@Pressidium)

### **************Kinsta**************

Kinsta (@Kinsta) is the official YouTube channel for Kinsta—a premium managed WordPress hosting platform known for performance, security, and developer tools. The channel features video content like “Kinsta Talks,” showcasing interviews with digital creators and thought leaders, along with tutorials and platform insights designed to help WordPress professionals thrive. It has approximately 38K subscribers and over 740 videos, making it a robust resource for hosting best practices and WordPress growth strategies. Videos are typically hosted by Kinsta team members and guest experts, offering polished, insightful presentations that align with the brand’s expert positioning.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/3hlhZnAkCRw/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @Kinsta](https://www.youtube.com/@Kinsta)

### **************BigScoots**************

BigScoots (@bigscoots2105) is the official YouTube presence for BigScoots, a web hosting provider offering managed WordPress hosting with a customer-first approach. The channel serves as a resource hub for hosting-related topics, such as infrastructure overviews and hosting workflows, along with insights into the service’s unique support-first philosophy. It currently has about 72 subscribers and 14 videos, offering a compact yet informative library. Content is presented by BigScoots team members or representatives, focusing on real-world hosting concerns and solutions.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/2zmZec5W8nk/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @bigscoots2105](https://www.youtube.com/@bigscoots2105)

### **************Cloudways**************

Cloudways (@Cloudways) is the official YouTube channel for Cloudways, a managed cloud hosting platform designed for WordPress, e-commerce platforms, and PHP-driven applications. The channel offers tutorial videos covering topics such as setting up staging environments, deploying WordPress sites, team collaboration workflows, and performance optimization. It currently has around 4.1K subscribers and approximately 496 videos, making it a solid resource hub for hosting insights. Content is delivered by Cloudways team members, showcasing real-world use cases and straightforward platform guidance.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/lZ3NcQJafBg/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @Cloudways](https://www.youtube.com/@Cloudways)

### **************Hostinger Academy**************

Hostinger Academy (@HostingerAcademy) is the official educational YouTube channel from Hostinger, offering practical guidance on building, managing, and growing online projects—from WordPress sites to small businesses and n8n automation. With over 320K subscribers and around 800 videos, it stands out as a comprehensive resource for all things digital creation and hosting. The content features tutorials, walkthroughs, and expert-led guides designed to empower creators with actionable, step-by-step learning. Videos are hosted by Hostinger’s team, showcasing real examples and clear explanations that make every topic accessible.

![YouTube video thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/nqCv-7gv9o0/maxresdefault.jpg)



[SUBSCRIBE @HostingerAcademy](https://www.youtube.com/@HostingerAcademy)

### **************Convesio**************

Convesio (@convesio) is the official YouTube channel of Convesio—a cutting-edge managed WordPress hosting platform built for high-traffic and scalable eCommerce sites. The content centers around technical discussions, platform features like auto-scaling and self-healing infrastructure, and interviews that highlight innovation in WordPress hosting strategy. The channel has around 166 subscribers and approximately 226 videos, serving as a focused hub for developers, agencies, and growth-focused site owners. Videos are presented by Convesio team members and leadership, offering expert insights into building resilient, container-based WordPress environments.

[SUBSCRIBE @convesio](https://www.youtube.com/@convesio)
